roles.core: central bot, D1 authority, schema migration, update controller, payment callbacks, report outbox and Durable Object live usage engine
roles.edge: reseller bots, customer order/service UI, reseller web dashboard and PasarGuard service lifecycle
roles.processor: advanced schedules, auto-renewal, service health, reseller tiers, backups, campaigns and background reports

core: PROCESSOR_WORKER (optional for direct Cloudflare deployment fallback)

features: allows a reseller bot owner to replace the BotFather token from the central bot or the reseller /manage interface
validates the new token with Telegram getMe and rejects the central bot token or a bot already assigned to another reseller
preserves the reseller bot database identity, customers, orders, plans, balances, services and all configuration
provisions the new Telegram bot with a fresh webhook secret before switching the D1 token record
invalidates the old webhook when the Telegram bot identity changes and clears decrypted token caches
reconfigures webhook, Mini App menu and runtime version after token rotation
keeps all previous active-group defaults, error-center migration, exact-commit update and billing features

deployment.automatic_provisioning: upload the ZIP through the central bot; it commits to GitHub and pins deployment to that exact commit
deployment.recovery: unfinished stages resume on Cron and eligible panel/admin requests
deployment.error_center_schema: partial unique index idx_error_center_open_key on scope,bot_id,error_code where status=open
deployment.staged_compatibility: Processor uses INSERT OR IGNORE plus conditional UPDATE until Core migration is guaranteed
deployment.default_group_assignment: explicit location group IDs override; otherwise all active/assignable PasarGuard groups are attached
deployment.reseller_token_rotation: fresh webhook secret, Telegram validation, D1 identity switch, cache invalidation and old-webhook cleanup

validation.duplicate_bot_guard: passed with mocked duplicate bot record
validation.central_bot_guard: passed with mocked central Telegram id
validation.same_bot_token_rotation: passed with mocked Telegram and D1
validation.different_bot_token_rotation: passed with old webhook cleanup assertion
validation.token_cache_invalidation: passed with mocked old cache entry

limitations: production Cloudflare, Telegram, GitHub and PasarGuard calls were not executed without account credentials
